kept.text:
Ordered $LLY’s new oral weight loss pills Foundayo through LillyDirect to test the service. Paid $149 for the month without using insurance, and it was delivered in 3 days.

This made me wonder: what’s the value proposition of $HIMS if $LLY has an affordable DTC channel as well? https://t.co/VbaqLPy9Fd

kept.text:
$CABA great pricing and big funds! 
And there is $LLY in the mix! 👀
The financing included participation from Bain Capital Life Sciences, Adage Capital Management, Cormorant Asset Management and other existing investors, multiple new mutual and sovereign wealth funds and Eli Lilly and Company.

The purchase price for the common stock is $2.90 per share, which represents the at-the-market price under Nasdaq rules. All of the shares in the offering are being sold by Cabaletta.

kept.text:
⚡ 𝐔𝐏𝐃𝐀𝐓𝐄: Eli Lilly Shares Fall as Analyst Flags Liver Case; Novo Nordisk Rises  - $LLY $NVO

👉 𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:

➤  Eli Lilly stock drops 𝟑% while Novo Nordisk gains 𝟐%.

➤  Analyst flags hepatic failure case linked to 𝐅𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐚𝐲𝐨 FDA report.

➤  Case involves 𝟓𝟔-𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫-𝐨𝐥𝐝 patient, submitted April 𝟑𝟎.

➤  Similar liver events reported across 𝐆𝐋𝐏-𝟏 drugs historically.

➤  Data shows hundreds of cases versus 𝐦𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 of prescriptions.

➤  Trials including 𝐀𝐂𝐇𝐈𝐄𝐕𝐄-𝟒 showed no clear hepatic safety signal.

➤  Analyst urges Lilly to ensure 𝐫𝐚𝐩𝐢𝐝 case review to avoid confusion.

tweet.text:
One case is meaningless unless confirmed as no other reason to explain for $LLy orforglipron.    But ALT imbalance was a repeated theme in all of $LLy ( higher dose ) , $GPCR and $AZN trials. 

 $PFE  killed danuglipron for a single case ? And CMO stated not even sure 100 % related. ?

If this Lilly report is true then it is showing up at starter dose , which is possible when u give 20000 humans the drug and there in a potential for DDI. 

Again if true it is showing up much sooner than I thought. 

Could make oral peptide Co explode.  
 like $VKTX has now with potentially two offerings with oral amylin peptide entering clinic
